title: Programming Paradigms: Procedural vs. Object-Oriented
description: A visual comparison of the core differences in structure and data handling between the Procedural and Object-Oriented programming paradigms.
relationships: Procedural Paradigm shows Data and Functions as separate entities, with functions acting upon data
Object-Oriented Paradigm shows Objects which encapsulate their Data and Methods together
An arrow contrasts the two, highlighting the paradigm shift from separating code and data to bundling them together in objects
